channel.title: SC on Detention Pipeline
channel.description: Recent content in SC on Detention Pipeline

item.title: 287(g) JEM: Horry County Sheriff’s Office (SC)
item.description:
287(g) agreement between ICE and Horry County Sheriff’s Office.

Model: JEM Signed: June 9, 2020 County: Horry County State: SC FIPS: 45051

Source: Prison Policy Initiative appendix table, compiled from ICE data as of Feb 17, 2026.
